listings.name: Flying J Travel Center #661
listings.description: 24-hour Pilot Flying J travel center on I-65 at Exit 2 (US-31W / Nashville Road), just north of the Tennessee line in Franklin (Simpson County). Amenities include diesel and DEF lanes, showers, a certified CAT Scale, restaurant/QSR, convenience store, ATM, propane, laundry/lounge, RV parking and premium Wi-Fi. Directories list roughly 170+ truck parking spaces.
listings.corroboration: Official Pilot Flying J locator page (egress-blocked to fetcher, confirmed via search snippet), TruckStopsAndServices, TruckMap, Yelp and Allstays agree on Flying J #661 at 4380 Nashville Rd, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 2, phone 270-586-3343, 24-hour, with CAT Scale and ~172 truck spaces.

listings.name: CAT Scale at Flying J Travel Center #661
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Flying J Travel Center #661, I-65 Exit 2 (Nashville Road), Franklin. Provides guaranteed-accurate certified weights for commercial trucks.
listings.corroboration: Pilot Flying J official amenity list and TruckStopsAndServices both list a CAT Scale at Flying J #661; CAT Scale Kentucky locator lists a scale at I-65 Exit 2 Franklin (phone 270-586-3343 matches the Flying J). Co-located service, separate row from the host truck stop.

listings.name: Keystop Truck Stop
listings.description: 24-hour independent truck stop on I-65 at Exit 2 (Nashville Road), Franklin. Directories list about 79 truck parking spaces, 6 fuel lanes and 3 showers, plus diesel, fast food, deli, convenience store, ATM, dump station and Wi-Fi.
listings.corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices, FindTruckService and Roadnow agree on Keystop Truck Stop at 4425 Nashville Rd, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 2, phone 270-586-5922, ~79 spaces / 6 fuel lanes / 3 showers, 24-hour.

listings.name: Pilot Travel Center #438
listings.description: 24-hour Pilot travel center on I-65 at Exit 6 (KY-100 / Scottsville Road), Franklin. Amenities include diesel and DEF lanes, showers, a certified CAT Scale, QSR/food, convenience store, ATM and Wi-Fi. Directories list roughly 150 truck parking spaces (plus reservable prime spots) and 9 showers.
listings.corroboration: Official Pilot Flying J locator (egress-blocked, confirmed via snippet), TruckStopsAndServices, ParkAdvisor and Yelp agree on Pilot #438 at 2940 Scottsville Rd, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 6, phone 270-586-9544, 24-hour, CAT Scale, ~150 spaces / 9 showers.

listings.name: CAT Scale at Pilot Travel Center #438
listings.description: Certified CAT Scale co-located at Pilot Travel Center #438, I-65 Exit 6 (Scottsville Road), Franklin. Provides guaranteed-accurate certified weights for commercial trucks.
listings.corroboration: Pilot #438 official amenity list and TruckStopsAndServices list a CAT Scale; CAT Scale Kentucky locator lists a scale at I-65 Exit 6 Franklin. Co-located service, separate row from the host truck stop.

listings.name: Sudden Service #62 Travel Center
listings.description: 24-hour AMBEST / Shell-branded travel center on I-65 at Exit 6 (KY-100 / Scottsville Road), Franklin (formerly listed as Bluegrass Truck Plaza). Directories list about 92 truck parking spaces, 6 fuel lanes and 4 showers, plus bulk DEF, convenience store, fast food, laundry, truckers lounge, certified scales, trailer drop, on-site truck/trailer wash and truck repairs.
listings.corroboration: Sudden Service official store-locator page, TruckStopsAndServices, TruckMap, Allstays and TruckerPath agree on Sudden Service #62 Travel Center (AMBEST, Shell fuel) at 3303 Scottsville Rd, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 6, phone 270-586-3248, 24-hour, ~92 spaces / 6 lanes / 4 showers. Certified scales noted (not confirmed as a branded CAT Scale, so no separate CAT Scale row created).

listings.name: Speedco (Love's) Franklin
listings.description: Speedco (Love's) truck lube, preventive-maintenance and tire shop on I-65 at Exit 6 (Scottsville Road), Franklin. Services include fast oil/lube PM service, DOT inspections and commercial tire sales/service for Class 8 trucks. Standalone service facility co-located near the Exit 6 truck-stop cluster.
listings.corroboration: Love's/Speedco official location page (Franklin #919), iExit, TruckStopsAndServices, Yelp and 4RoadService agree on Speedco at 2875 Scottsville Rd, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 6, phone 270-598-9521, truck lube/PM/tire services.

listings.name: TA Truck Service Franklin
listings.description: TravelCenters of America (TA) standalone truck service shop on I-65 at Exit 6 (Scottsville Road), Franklin. Provides commercial truck tire sales/service and mechanical/diesel repair. Facility #0347.
listings.corroboration: TA/Petro official location page (egress-blocked, confirmed via snippet), Yelp (101 Trotters Ln), Carrier Atlas (TA Truck Service Franklin #0347) and the facility's Facebook page agree on a standalone TA truck-service shop at 101 Trotter Lane, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 6. Phone left blank (not independently confirmed).

listings.name: Pride Truck Wash - Franklin
listings.description: Commercial truck and trailer wash on I-65 at Exit 6 (Scottsville Road), Franklin, on the Pilot #438 lot. Services include tractor wash, trailer wash/washout, engine wash, undercarriage rinse, inside-frame wash and degrease. Standalone wash operator co-located with the truck stop.
listings.corroboration: Yelp, TruckWashRatings, FindTruckService, Trucker Guide and Facebook agree on Pride Truck Wash at 2940 Scottsville Rd, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 6, phone 270-586-0116, a full tractor/trailer wash. (Prior 'G Truck Wash' reference resolved to Pride Truck Wash at the same address.)

listings.name: Best One Fleet Service - Bowling Green
listings.description: Commercial truck tire dealer and fleet service center in Bowling Green serving the I-65 freight corridor. 78,000 sq ft facility with 10 service bays, TIA-certified technicians, commercial tire sales/service, brakes, alignments, suspension and trailer repair, plus 24-hour roadside assistance.
listings.corroboration: Best One official site, FindTruckService, Michelin and Bridgestone commercial dealer locators and TruckerPath agree on Best One Fleet Service at 200 Tobacco Rd, Bowling Green 42101, phone 270-282-2108, commercial truck tires/repair with 24-hr roadside. Exit left blank (not confirmed). Distinct from the existing production 'Best-One Tire' listings on I-75.

listings.name: Ziegler Tire - Bowling Green (Commercial)
listings.description: Ziegler Tire commercial location in Bowling Green serving the I-65 corridor. Commercial truck/OTR tire sales, retreading, fleet inspections and maintenance, with 24/7 roadside assistance.
listings.corroboration: Ziegler Tire official commercial-location page, Michelin, Bridgestone and Firestone dealer locators and Yellow Pages agree on Ziegler Tire at 119 Ambassador Dr, Bowling Green 42101, phone 270-282-2171, commercial truck tire/fleet service. Distinct facility from the existing production 'Ziegler Tire | Lexington' (I-75) listing. Exit left blank (not confirmed).

listings.name: Days Inn by Wyndham Franklin
listings.description: Days Inn by Wyndham hotel on I-65 at Exit 6 (Scottsville Road), Franklin, offering free on-site truck/RV parking (directories list roughly 5-18 truck spaces on the south side of the property).
listings.corroboration: Wyndham/Days Inn official overview, TruckStopsAndServices, iExit (travelcoupons), HotelGuides and Allstays agree on Days Inn Franklin at 103 Trotter Lane, Franklin 42134, I-65 Exit 6, with free truck/RV parking. Truck-space count left blank (sources vary 5-18).

listings.name: Ramada by Wyndham Bowling Green
listings.description: Ramada by Wyndham hotel on I-65 at Exit 22 (US-231 / Scottsville Road), Bowling Green, offering free RV/bus/truck parking for guests.
listings.corroboration: TruckStopsAndServices (I-65 Exit 22), HotelGuides and Orbitz agree on Ramada by Wyndham Bowling Green at 4767 Scottsville Rd, Bowling Green 42104, I-65 Exit 22, with free truck/bus/RV parking for guests. Phone left blank (not confirmed).

listings.name: Kentucky Weigh Station - I-65 Northbound (Simpson County)
listings.description: Permanent Kentucky commercial-vehicle weigh/inspection station on northbound I-65 in Simpson County near Franklin, between Exit 2 (Nashville Road) and Exit 6 (Scottsville Road), just north of the Tennessee state line. Operated by Kentucky State Police Commercial Vehicle Enforcement (KSP CVE).
listings.corroboration: CoopsAreOpen (Post 2 Franklin, I-65 northbound, located between Exit 2 Flying J and the Exit 6 truck stops), iExit and TruckStopsAndServices confirm a permanent I-65 northbound weigh station in Simpson County/Franklin. Southbound facility not independently confirmed, so only the northbound station is listed.

listings.name: Simpson County (Franklin) Welcome Center - I-65 Northbound
listings.description: Kentucky Welcome Center on northbound I-65 in Simpson County just north of the Tennessee line, near Franklin. New facility opened October 2025 (replacing the demolished 1974 center). Provides restrooms, vending and commercial truck parking (roughly 20 truck spaces) with high-mast lighting.
listings.hold_reason: Legal overnight-parking status not independently confirmed; welcome centers are day-use unless posted otherwise, so per conservative rest-area rules this is held pending confirmation of overnight legality. Direction (NB), existence and truck access are confirmed.
listings.corroboration: Kentucky Tourism, WBKO and WTVQ confirm the new Simpson County (Franklin) Welcome Center on I-65 northbound opened October 2025 with commercial truck parking; RestAreas.org confirms NB direction near the TN line. Held (published=false) because legal overnight-parking status is not confirmed.

listings.name: All Star Towing & Road Service (at Sudden Service #62)
listings.description: 24-hour towing and roadside truck-repair operator co-located at Sudden Service #62 Travel Center, I-65 Exit 6, Franklin. Listed services include towing, tire service, DOT inspections, mechanical repair and welding.
listings.hold_reason: Operator identity, current operating status and exact affiliation confirmed only via a single truck-stop directory listing; not independently corroborated. Held pending a second independent source.
listings.corroboration: Single directory (TruckStopsAndServices) lists All Star Towing & Road Service (270-202-3331) as an on-site service at Sudden Service #62, 3303 Scottsville Rd, Franklin. Only one source, so held.

excluded.name: TA Smiths Grove
excluded.reason: I-65 Exit 38 — north of this segment's range (exits 2-30); belongs to the next I-65 KY segment.

excluded.name: Love's Travel Stop #360
excluded.reason: I-65 Exit 58 — well north of segment range; not in exits 2-30.

excluded.name: Petro Stopping Center #330 / Pilot Travel Center
excluded.reason: I-65 Exit 86 — far north of segment range.

excluded.name: Blue Beacon Truck Wash (Sonora / Glendale)
excluded.reason: Nearest Blue Beacon locations are I-65 Exit 81 (Sonora) and Exit 86 (Glendale) — north of segment range; no Blue Beacon in exits 2-30.

excluded.name: BG Food Mart
excluded.reason: Located at 4805 Nashville Rd on I-165 (Natcher Parkway) Exit 3, not I-65 — primarily serves a different route.

excluded.name: Cracker Barrel Bowling Green (Exit 22)
excluded.reason: Restaurant offering informal/boondock truck parking; not a listed facility category and overnight status not officially sanctioned.

excluded.name: Parkway Shell
excluded.reason: Appears to sit on the US-31W Bypass rather than an I-65 exit; I-65 truck-stop identity/access not confirmed.

excluded.name: Specialized Truck Repair / Road Rescue Network / iFleet / mobile-repair aggregators
excluded.reason: Lead-generation / dispatch-network pages, not verifiable fixed local businesses; identity and address could not be independently confirmed.
